rationale: The citing paper’s core process account explicitly relies on **surprise** (title: “Role of Anchoring and Surprise”), and the cited paper is directly about consumer response to **unexpected** in-store coupons (“Pleasant Surprises”), making it a plausible mechanism/theory source rather than a purely incidental mention. Given this thematic overlap in surprise-driven consumer pricing responses and only sparse raw evidence (DOI-only match), it is not safe to drop at triage.
